core_payload.content:
# Key Agents

## Dream Direction
In the Dream branch, Key Agents becomes a clearer operating map for the N1Hub intelligence system, with stronger role boundaries, better implementation alignment, and richer coordination between assistant, mining, planning, maintenance, and review workers.

## Future Potential
- cleaner division of user-facing and background roles
- better orchestration of mining, planning, vault stewardship, and graph-maintenance workers
- clearer implementation roadmap for the full swarm
- stronger visibility into who owns which class of intelligence work
- a more explicit planning swarm where Planning Horizon Engine coordinates the path from Dream to day-level execution
- a more explicit vault stewardship lane where the system reads the vault, generates jobs, and executes bounded Dream-safe work

## Why It Matters
Dream preserves this hub as the explicit architectural map of the sovereign agent system rather than leaving the project to vague talk about AI features.

## Autonomous Vault Swarm Notes

- Run: vault-steward-1773015063934
- Job: Decomposition review for unfinished foundation hubs
- Workstream: decomposition
- Note: Refined the summary to keep this hub at the role-map and orchestration level rather than the details of any one lane. The cleanest future splits are assistant-facing roles, background mining and graph-maintenance workers, and the planning coordination layer anchored by Planning Horizon Engine.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Key Agents is the Dream-branch hub that maps the core agent lanes of N1Hub and their coordination boundaries across assistant, mining, planning, vault stewardship, maintenance, and review work. It preserves the system as a role map and implementation roadmap, with Planning Horizon Engine bridging Dream-to-day execution and vault stewardship bridging vault reading to bounded capsule work, rather than collapsing the architecture into vague AI features.
